vBRIEFInfo.description: Scope vBRIEF (#883 child): re-run v0.26.0 cache+triage scale smoke after #952 bootstrap-hang fix landed in PR #955 (master @ e51f35d). Validate fix at full backlog scale + capture full Phase 2 metrics + idempotency check.

plan.title: v0.26.0 cache-layer scale smoke re-run after #952 bootstrap-hang fix (#883)

narratives.Problem: Prior smoke (PR #953, doc: docs/smoke-2026-05-06-v0.26.0-scale.md) captured Phase 1 (N=50 filtered) cleanly but Phase 2 (full backlog) was salvaged read-only after the bootstrap orchestrator hung at 18:00 UTC after cache:fetch-all completed (filed as #952). PR #955 landed a watchdog (default 3600s, configurable) plus per-step structured progress on master @ e51f35d. We need empirical validation that the fix works at real-world scale, plus full Phase 2 metrics and an idempotency confirmation that were not captured the first time.
narratives.Overview: Docs+evidence run only. Wipe .deft-cache for a clean baseline, run task triage:bootstrap at full backlog scale with default watchdog, capture Phase 2 metrics (wall-clock, succeeded/failed/skipped, structured progress timings, audit/cache sizes, scanner flag distribution). Re-run cache:fetch-all immediately to confirm Story 2 idempotency (skip-fresh on every entry). Write docs/smoke-2026-05-07-v0.26.0-rerun.md with metrics + comparison vs prior smoke + evidence findings on #946-#949.
narratives.Background: v0.26.0 ships unified content cache + quarantine layer (#883 epic). PR #955 fixed the orchestrator hang surfaced in #952. Issues #946-#949 are open follow-ups (cache integrity, sizing, audit growth, detector tuning) that benefit from full-scale evidence comments.
narratives.Constraint: Docs-only PR. Do NOT modify scripts/, tasks/, skills/. Do NOT promote CHANGELOG to v0.26.1. Do NOT fix any defects surfaced -- file new issues if any. 90 min wall-clock cap. PowerShell 5.1 Python pathlib for non-ASCII edits.
narratives.Risk: (R-1) Bootstrap hangs again at scale -- mitigated by the new watchdog defaulting to 3600s; if it fires, BLOCKED with full progress output for diagnosis. (R-2) New defects surface during the run -- file as new issues, do NOT attempt to fix in this PR.
narratives.Outcome: Acceptance: (1) docs/smoke-2026-05-07-v0.26.0-rerun.md exists with TL;DR + Methodology + Phase 2 metrics + Phase 2B idempotency table + comparison vs prior smoke + Findings sections; (2) evidence comments posted on each of #946, #947, #948, #949; (3) draft PR open against master citing the smoke doc and evidence comments; (4) CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased] docs bullet added.
narratives.Test: task check green. skills/deft-directive-pre-pr/SKILL.md RWLD until clean. cache layout integrity spot-check (5 random meta.json schema conformance, no orphan dirs, audit-log monotonic timestamps).
narratives.Action: Execute steps 1-15 from the dispatch directive: branch -> wipe cache -> bootstrap -> idempotency check -> snapshot -> doc -> evidence comments -> pre-pr -> changelog -> scope:complete -> commit+push -> draft PR -> done message.
narratives.Urgency: v0.26.0 release validation depends on empirical confirmation that the bootstrap-hang fix holds at scale. The four follow-up issues (#946-#949) are blocked on full-scale evidence.

items.title: Author docs/smoke-2026-05-07-v0.26.0-rerun.md with full Phase 2 + Phase 2B metrics, comparison vs prior smoke, and findings on #946-#949

narrative.Action: Python pathlib write with utf-8 encoding (PS 5.1 safe). Cross-reference docs/smoke-2026-05-06-v0.26.0-scale.md.

items.title: Post evidence comments on #946, #947, #948, #949 with relevant metrics from this run via gh api

narrative.Action: Use gh api repos/deftai/directive/issues/<N>/comments -X POST --input - with JSON body written via Python.

items.title: CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased] docs bullet + draft PR against master

narrative.Action: PR body: TL;DR, comparison vs prior smoke, list of evidence comments. Draft only -- do not ready for merge.

depends_on: #955 bootstrap watchdog + structured progress (merged on master @ e51f35d)

references.title: Issue #883 (epic): unified content cache + quarantine layer for triage v1
PR #953: prior v0.26.0 scale smoke (Phase 1 clean + Phase 2 partial)
PR #955: bootstrap watchdog + per-step structured progress (fixes #952)
Issue #952: bootstrap orchestrator hang at backlog scale (FIXED by #955)
